name: Miror B.
description:
Miror B. Is a main antagonist from Pokemon Colosseum/XD. He was a former high ranking member of the Cipher syndicate based in the Orre region. Sometime after the disbandmnent of the organization, he left them and became a wandering trainer with his henchmen Trudly and Folly. He still intended to cause mischief wherever he goes including stealing what shadow Pokemon still remain around the region.

He is a tall slender man sporting a flashy outfit consisting of a purple disco-esque suit with his torso exposed and also wearing matching pants, high disco platform shoes and a yellow scarf. His hair is styled as an overly large pokeball and he also wears blue sunglasses.

As a trainer he's known to prefer using primarily those in the Lotad evolution line, occasionally mixing it up with other pokemon known to also "Dance".
creator: AnimeMan1993
